data.body: 4001 RED evidence: authored 4 tests. test_compact_negative.py::test_forward_rename_fault_clean_rollback PASSES vs unmodified code (codifies existing clean-rollback=remove-snapshot contract). 3 RED for right reason: reverse_rename_fault_retains_snapshot (current code removes snapshot + says 'failed to retire', not 'rollback incomplete'), and the 2 held-out fsck recovery tests (test_compact_rollback_recovery.py) can't even build the mixed state (snapshot not retained). Held-out oracle = test_compact_rollback_recovery.py moved to /Users/joeoakhart/.claude/jobs/d1008871/tmp during implementation. Implementer sees only compact.py + test_compact_negative.py.
